verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — minimum-wage data gate failed; missing state/subnational outcome/treatment panels
verdict_reason: minimum-wage data gate failed; missing state/subnational outcome/treatment panels
falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Stratified Callaway-Sant'Anna DiD on US state min-wage cohorts by bite-ratio terciles 1971-2023; supported if high-bite (>0.6) cohorts show low-skill disemployment >2pp larger than low-bite at p<0.10.

estimate.error: minimum-wage data gate failed; missing state/subnational outcome/treatment panels

incompatible_local_vintages: fred:LNS12300012 is national teen E/P, not the state panel required by the preregistered DiD.
fred:STTMINWGCA is a California exemplar, not all-state statutory treatment timing.
OECD MWUSD can contextualize bite ratios but cannot replace the state-year cohort design.
secondary_or_verdict_completeness_source: bls:QCEW_county_NAICS722_employment_panel for border-pair and low-wage-sector robustness.
oecd:MWUSD_minimum_to_median_wage_ratio for cross-country descriptive context only.
oecd:DSD_LMS_low_education_unemployment_rate for non-US robustness after native OECD keying is wired.
runner_limitation: The high-bite design requires state/unit cohort timing and local bite ratios. Do not run the generic country-year path until unit_id support or a validated state-year derived panel is present.
data_repair_note: bls:LAU_state_teen_employment_population_ratio_panel — BLS/CPS-LAU state teen employment-to-population panel, keyed by state and year. The national FRED LNS12300012 series is useful context but cannot identify high-bite state cohorts.
usdol:state_minimum_wage_history — USDOL all-state statutory minimum-wage history with federal-floor fallback and binding-change flags.
bls:OES_state_median_hourly_wage_panel — BLS OES/OEWS state median hourly wage panel to construct the local minimum-to-median bite ratio used for high-bite stratification.
